data.title: Tired Good Night GIF by Goatta Be Me Goats! Adventures of Pumpkin, Cookie and Java!

user.display_name: Goatta Be Me Goats! Adventures of Java, Toffee, Pumpkin and Cookie!
user.description:
Welcome to "Goatta Be Me!" featuring the fun adventures and shenanigans of our Starring Divas: Princess Toffee and Miss Java Latte, with Angels Pumpkin and Cookie! 

We are Nigerian Dwarf goats who love showing off our love for life and the awesome things we can do. We know how to jump and slide down our slide, potty in a litter box, move chairs around so we can see over the fence and so much more!  

People are always shocked to hear mommy and daddy have goats. They exclaim, "You have GOATS??" as if it is so strange! So, we want to share our lives with the world, so people will see that "Goats are loving, smart and super FUN!"   

Besides being incredibly cute and hilarious, we're also Assistance Animals for our mommy, who lives with Multiple Sclerosis, Lyme Disease, Traumatic Brain Injury, Neck, Back and Chemical Injury. We know when she is in extra agony, so we wrap ourselves around her to let her know she is not alone! She is homebound, so we are here to show her how much she is loved, bring her smiles amidst her isolation and pain. Most of all, we give her reasons to keep fighting! 

Please FOLLOW and LIKE our social media channels and pages! And check out our website!  

Love, Princess Toffee Mocha, Miss Java Latte, Angel Pumpkin and Angel Cookie.
